content:
i built this thing called gitfut. it turns any GitHub profile into a FIFA Ultimate Team card, rated out of 99 from your actual stats (commits, stars, top languages, followers, account age). you can even just swap github.com for gitfut.com on any profile and it builds the card.
put it out about a week ago and honestly wasn't ready for what happened:
- 80k visitors, 255k cards generated
- 1.3k stars on github
- #1 of the day on r/coolgithubprojects AND r/SideProject
try yours at gitfut.com and drop your card link in the comments
github repo: https://github.com/Younesfdj/gitfut

  submitted by   /u/Jazzlike_Shift_1664
[link]   [comments]
